name: Talking Head Rant
description: Character monolog 15-20s — герой говорит на камеру / в камеру про X, deadpan ranting tone. Hook screenshot overlay в первые 3-4s (Reddit post / news headline / chat message), потом fade-out и goes-to character. Default character — IT-shnik / courier / mamochka-blogger / student архетип. Используется veo-3.1 для talking-head (better lip-sync чем kling), либо wan-25 fallback. Captions HormoziCaptions or KaraokeCaptions.

stackSummary.characterImage: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview через OpenRouter (single character + setting, photorealistic)
stackSummary.talkingHead: google/veo-3.1 через OpenRouter (i2v, 10-15s, lip-sync via prompt). Audio off, VO добавляем отдельно.
stackSummary.voiceover: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 (RU) — длинный монолог, разбитый по beats
stackSummary.music: ElevenLabs Music — minimal background bed (low energy), force_instrumental: true

constants.characterArchetype: from workspace/personas/ARCHETYPES.md (it-remote / courier / student / mamochka-blogger / z-zoomer)
constants.hookWindow: first 3-4s — hook screenshot overlay fade-out @ frame 90-120

variationAxes: rant subject (work, dating, prices, IT life, transport, food)
hook screenshot type (Reddit post / news headline / chat / tweet)
doNotCopyLiterally: Monologue text, character name, exact prompts, hook screenshot text. Vibe-reference only.
